form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after eight months 6th of 8 at Turffontein Standside on March 14 over 1800m, 10 len behind Choisaanada carrying 54kg at $41. form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of four months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation by 1.3 len Vaal December 11 over 1800m defeating Vesuvio carrying 59.5kg at $13.50. Previously first up; second last of 8 at Vaal September 12 2024 over 1200m, 6 len behind Open Highway carrying 58kg at $67. Top hope if back in good order.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start 2nd of 7 at this track on March 12 over 1600m, on a slow track; 0.6 len behind Fire Storm carrying 59kg at $4. Before that 2nd of 7 at Vaal on February 5 over 1600m, 1.75 len behind Birthright carrying 52kg at $2.30. Only time out of the placings in career was in stakes class. In the finish last time and should go well again.
